title: hydrangea macrophylla f. otaksa
intro: Hydrangea macrophylla f. otaksa is a variety of the Bigleaf Hydrangea plant, known for its large, round clusters of small, pink to blue flowers that bloom in the summer. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with medicinal properties attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an anti-oxidant. The health benefits of Hydrangea macrophylla f. otaksa include its potential to help alleviate arthritis symptoms, improve bone health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support urinary health and alleviate symptoms of kidney stones.
